name: Ford E-Series Type II Ambulance — Unit P-04 / #4
ebayTitle: Ford E-Series Type II High Top Ambulance Unit P-04
description:
Fleet-retired Prince George Transport Type II high-top ambulance, unit P-04 / side #4. SC plate P676883. Outdoor-stored; OUT OF SERVICE tag visible on dash. Driver-side lower body dent photographed. Cosmetic wear, pine debris, and fleet aging expected.

Local pickup only — Blythewood, SC (200 Louthian Way). Schedule a walkthrough to verify VIN, title status, miles, drivetrain condition, and remaining interior equipment. Sold as-is with no warranty. Call (803) 231-9420 for price and appointment.

Stored outdoors on grass; mildew/dirt on lower body typical of retired fleet vans. Patient compartment photographed being cleared (gray vinyl interior).

Local pickup only — Blythewood, SC. Walkthrough required for VIN, title, miles, and mechanical condition. Sold as-is, no warranty. Call (803) 231-9420 for price and appointment.
